stemHtml: Which statement below is correct with regard to the autobrake system in RTO mode?

options.a: With RTO not available, take-off might not be allowed because the minimum braking distance with manual braking is longer.
options.b: Without pilot input, the RTO mode will automatically brake the aircraft to a full stop.
options.c: Manual braking is the most efficient way to decelerate the aircraft.
options.d: RTO has a fixed force with which the aircraft is decelerated.
